summary: Payment expected for services on 14 June 2026 - £500.00

category.name: Employment and earnings - Ad hoc payments

fields.name: ReceivedDate
fields.description: Date the payment was received or date the services were completed or provided on, if payment not received

fields.name: JobTitle
fields.description: Type of work or service being provided, if different to the nature of the work provided in parent interest

fields.name: PaymentType
fields.description: Whether the payment was monetary or in kind

fields.name: PaymentDescription
fields.value: To provide one speech as part of the David Lloyd George Memorial Lecture at the annual Gŵyl Cricieth Festival

fields.name: Value
fields.description: Amount or value of the payment

fields.name: HoursWorked
fields.description: Number of hours worked. If a regular payment, this is hours worked per period

fields.name: HoursDetails
fields.description: Additional information about the hours worked
fields.value: Estimated, including providing the lecture and preparation

fields.name: IsUltimatePayerDifferent
fields.description: Whether the ultimate payer is different to the payer specified in linked parent interest

fields.name: UltimatePayerName
fields.description: Name of the ultimate payer (if different to parent interest)

fields.name: UltimatePayerProtectedByConfidentiality
fields.description: Whether the ultimate payer details are confidential (if different to parent interest)

fields.name: UltimatePayerAddress
fields.description: Address of the ultimate payer, if this can be publicly shared (if different to parent interest)

fields.name: UltimatePayerNatureOfBusiness
fields.description: Brief description of the ultimate payer's business (if different to parent interest)

fields.name: IsPaymentDonated
fields.description: Whether the payment was donated to a third party, or will be

fields.name: DonateePaidBy
fields.description: Whether the payment was donated by the Member, or direct from the payer (if donated)
fields.value: Paid direct to the recipient by the payer

fields.name: DonateeType
fields.description: Type of third-party the payment was, or will be, donated to (if donated)

fields.name: DonateeDetails
fields.description: Name of the recipient, if donatee type is 'Other' (if donated)
